message:
feat(ensemble): Add export-findings command and improve synthesis workflow

Major enhancement to ensemble functionality adding the ability to export
findings from multi-agent research sessions. Implements a comprehensive
export command that extracts, formats, and outputs collective findings
from ensemble investigations.

Key changes:
- Add newEnsembleExportFindingsCmd for exporting ensemble findings (+737 LOC)
- Integrate export functionality into ensemble command hierarchy
- Update status output struct for cleaner JSON serialization
- Improve stop output struct formatting consistency
- Add supporting test coverage for new functionality
- Enhance summary generator with export-compatible formatting

The export-findings command enables users to extract actionable insights
from completed ensemble sessions, supporting both human-readable and
machine-parseable output formats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
